channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Figma's
item.description: Figma's architecture, built on WebAssembly and WebGL, redefined collaborative design. Unpack its tech stack and why Adobe's acquisition failed.

item.title: Launch in 30 Days
item.description: Launch MVP in 30 days with React, Node.js, and MongoDB

item.title: Secure Your Web App
item.description: Run a web app security audit with expert insights. Cover SAST, DAST, manual pentesting, real-world numbers, tools like Burp Suite & ZAP. Avoid common pitfalls.

item.title: D
item.description: Stop DDoS attacks with real-world strategies. Understand L3/L7 attacks, implement Nginx/Flask rate limits, and avoid common defense mistakes. Includes specific tools and original insights.

item.title: Developer's Guide
item.description: Build passive income as a developer. Leverage serverless, Stripe, and automation to create scalable micro-SaaS and API products.

item.title: Terraform IaC Mastery
item.description: Terraform IaC guide with real-world examples

item.title: Free AI APIs
item.description: Unlock free AI APIs from Hugging Face, Google, and more. Understand real-world limits, performance, and hidden costs. Get pro insights on production readiness and critical tradeoffs.

item.title: Tame Tech Debt
item.description: Measure and pay down technical debt

item.title: APIs Minting Money
item.description: Twilio and Stripe's API economy success

item.title: Tech Boom Jobs ..
item.description: Fastest growing tech roles: cloud engineer, data scientist, product manager

item.title: Git Like a Pro ..
item.description: Master advanced Git commands for senior developers. Optimize history, debug efficiently, and switch contexts with rebase, bisect, worktree, and filter-repo.

item.title: Server Components vs Client Components Explained: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Server Components vs Client Components Explained covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Augment Reality with Apple Vision Pro
Solo SaaS Success
item.description: Solo SaaS success with Docker, Kubernetes, and Redis
